name: Break-Even Calculator
description: Calculate units needed to cover fixed costs.
formula: Break-even Units = Fixed Costs / (Price - Variable Cost)

example.explanation: Break-even is the number of units needed to cover fixed costs.

faqs.question: What is break-even?
faqs.answer: It's the point where total revenue equals total costs.

faqs.question: Can I reduce break-even?
faqs.answer: Lower fixed costs or increase margin (price - variable cost) to reduce it.

faqs.question: Why is break-even important?
faqs.answer: It helps you understand the minimum sales needed to avoid losses.
